creator: samm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Rawstudio is an open-source program to read and manipulate RAW images from most
digital cameras. Rawstudio will convert your RAW files into JPEG, PNG or TIF 
images which you can then print or send to friends and clients.
It has a graphical user interface, so you can simply open a RAW file and 
experiment with the controls to see how they effect the image. 

WWW:	http://rawstudio.org

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
